title: Turn Sequence
items: 1. Establish Initiative — Secret bid of Action Tokens. Highest bidder wins. Ties: open bid → compare remaining tokens → D12 roll.
2. Electronic Warfare — Choose frequency (1-6 or 7-12). Spread Interference Tokens between defending own frequency and jamming opponent's.
3. Deployment (Turn 1) / Reserves (Turn 2+) — Loser deploys first. Reserves enter from table edge, costs 1 Action Token.
4. Alternate Activations — Players alternate activating ONE element. Each element has 2 Action Tokens. Must use all actions.
5. Situation Update — Remove Guard tokens, Call for Fire tokens, Smokescreen tokens, and other turn-duration effects.
6. Turn Summary — Record casualties, update VP, check victory conditions. Commander may declare Forfeit.

title: Turn Sequence (Quickplay)
items: 1. Establish Initiative — Player with fewer Action Tokens wins. Ties: fewer C in play → D12 roll.
2. Electronic Warfare — Simplified: when calling Reserves/Strategic Assets, build secret dice pools from Interference Tokens. Roll and compare.
3. Deployment / Reserves — Same as Core.
4. Alternate Activations — Same as Core.
5. Situation Update — Same as Core.
6. Turn Summary — Same as Core.

title: Actions (1 AT each unless noted)
items: MOVE — Cautious (M"), Patrol (2×M"), Rapid (3×M", requires special rule). Cautious grants Alert (360° AoV).
SHOOT — Roll F dice. Defender rolls D dice (matching cancels). Group remaining into pools ≥ Effective Range = 1 hit each.
MOVE & SHOOT — Move (Cautious/Patrol) + Shoot in either order. F is halved (round up).
AIMED SHOT (2 AT) — +1F (+2F in Quickplay). Enemy may react before shot resolves.
GUARD — Must be last action. Saves reaction for later: Move, Shoot, Move & Shoot, Counter-Charge, Castle, Do Nothing.
CHARGE — Move into base contact with enemy. Combat Roll: both roll C dice. Threshold = opponent's C + A.
SUPPRESSIVE FIRE — Roll F for max range. Creates F" radius Dangerous Terrain. Costs 1F permanently (restore via Reload).
AREA BOMBARDMENT — Like Suppressive Fire for Indirect Fire weapons. No LoS required.
RELAY COORDINATES — Mark target in LoS for Indirect Fire. Free in Quickplay.
RELOAD — Roll D dice vs Damage Bar total. Any die > total damage = success (restore 1F).
EMBARK / DISEMBARK — Base contact with transport. Ends action.
COMBAT DROP — Drop element from Aircraft. Controlled Crash (damage halved).
DO NOTHING — Remove token. Opponents with LoS may react.

title: Shooting Resolution
items: 1. DECLARE TARGET — Must be in Line of Fire (LoS + AoF).
2. CHECK RANGE — Measure base-to-base. Add target's Armour (A) + Cover modifiers = Effective Range.
3. FIRE — Roll D12s equal to current F. Any 12 = Augment Die (extra die).
4. DEFENCE ROLL — If attack from within target's AoV, target rolls D dice. Matching values cancel attack dice. Augment dice cancel augment dice first.
5. CALCULATE HITS — Group remaining attack dice into pools. Each pool whose sum ≥ Effective Range = 1 hit. Twin pair in a pool = Critical Hit.
6. APPLY DAMAGE — Each hit: +1 to Damage Bar + reduce 1 stat (defender chooses, attacker chooses for criticals).

title: Initiative Resolution
items: Both players secretly bid Action Tokens from their pool (default 2 per element).
Reveal simultaneously. Highest bid wins Initiative.
Bid tokens are removed from elements at player's discretion.
Ties: open bidding one token at a time → compare remaining tokens → D12 roll.
Winner: chooses table edge, deployment order, and which side activates first.

title: Solo/Co-op Spawn Check
items: After each player action, roll D12 + current turn number.
Total 1–7: No spawn.
Total 8+: Spawn sequence begins (if AI FC not exhausted).
SPAWN CLASS: D12 → 1-3=C1, 4-6=C2, 7-8=C3, 9-10=C4, 11-12=Strategic Asset.
SUBTABLE: Roll D12 on class subtable for unit type. Cascade down if unavailable.
SPOTTING: Roll triggering element's D dice. Any 11+ = SPOTTED (→ Spotting Pool).
PLACEMENT: D12 for direction (1=toward deployment). Distance: D12+4 inches.
CONSTRAINTS: Min 1" from AI elements, 5" from player elements.

title: AI Target Priority
items: 1. Element that triggered the AI spawn.
2. Closest player element to an objective.
3. Player element with highest Class (C).
TIEBREAKERS: C3-4 AI targets highest C in LoS. C1-2 AI targets lowest C in LoS. Then most damaged. Then player picks.
